q1_definitional_sanity.definition: on AWAITING->ARMED, bull: low <= level + 0.5xATR; bear: high >= level - 0.5xATR

q1_conversion_rate.definition: fraction of BOS events that reach ARMED (retest occurred) within awaiting_timeout

q2_armed_outcomes.definition: outcome based on first close past level ± 1xATR in either direction within armed_window; ties or no-move = timeout
